items.title: June advance looks underpaid
items.description: Calculated advance is 19,000 but only 12,000 was transferred on the statement.
items.context: Compared bank outflow against the period tax calendar.
items.suggested_action: Confirm the shortfall and top up before the deadline.

items.title: New counterparty without a contract on file
items.description: Two incoming payments from a new buyer but no contract attached.
items.context: Detected during reconciliation of the latest statement.
items.suggested_action: Request the contract and primary documents.

items.title: FNS portal maintenance this weekend
items.description: Filing portal unavailable Saturday night; plan submissions earlier.
items.suggested_action: Submit pending declarations before Friday EOD.
